% book-en.tex — Pandoc XeLaTeX template for the English GEM-LLM book.
\documentclass[$if(fontsize)$$fontsize$,$endif$$if(papersize)$$papersize$paper,$endif$openany]{$if(documentclass)$$documentclass$$else$book$endif$}

\usepackage{geometry}
$if(geometry)$
\geometry{$for(geometry)$$geometry$$sep$,$endfor$}
$else$
\geometry{a4paper,margin=2.5cm}
$endif$

\usepackage{fontspec}
\setmainfont{$if(mainfont)$$mainfont$$else$DejaVu Serif$endif$}
\setsansfont{$if(sansfont)$$sansfont$$else$DejaVu Sans$endif$}
\setmonofont{$if(monofont)$$monofont$$else$DejaVu Sans Mono$endif$}

\usepackage{polyglossia}
\setdefaultlanguage{english}

\usepackage{microtype}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{caption}
% Pandoc-emitted environments and macros require these:
\usepackage{amsmath}
\usepackage{amssymb}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{calc}
\usepackage{etoolbox}
\usepackage{fancyvrb}
\usepackage{framed}
\providecommand{\tightlist}{\setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}\setlength{\parskip}{0pt}}
\providecommand{\passthrough}[1]{#1}
\providecommand{\pandocbounded}[1]{#1}
\captionsetup{font=small,labelfont=bf}
\usepackage{listings}
\lstset{
  basicstyle=\ttfamily\small,
  breaklines=true,
  columns=fullflexible,
  keepspaces=true,
  showstringspaces=false,
  frame=single,
  framerule=0.4pt,
  rulecolor=\color{black!30},
}
\usepackage[dvipsnames]{xcolor}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\hypersetup{
  colorlinks=true,
  linkcolor=$if(linkcolor)$$linkcolor$$else$NavyBlue$endif$,
  urlcolor=$if(urlcolor)$$urlcolor$$else$NavyBlue$endif$,
  citecolor=$if(citecolor)$$citecolor$$else$NavyBlue$endif$,
  pdftitle={$title$},
  pdfauthor={$for(author)$$author$$sep$, $endfor$},
  pdflang={$lang$}
}

$if(numbersections)$
\setcounter{secnumdepth}{3}
$endif$

$for(header-includes)$
$header-includes$
$endfor$

\title{$title$$if(subtitle)$\\\large $subtitle$$endif$}
\author{$for(author)$$author$$sep$ \and $endfor$}
\date{$date$}

% Provide an abstract environment for `book` class (which lacks one by default).
\makeatletter
\@ifundefined{abstract}{
  \providecommand{\abstractname}{Abstract}
  \newenvironment{abstract}{\small\begin{quote}\noindent\textbf{\abstractname.}\quad}{\end{quote}\normalsize}
}{}
\makeatother

\begin{document}
\maketitle

$if(abstract)$
\begin{abstract}
$abstract$
\end{abstract}
$endif$

$if(toc)$
\tableofcontents
\clearpage
$endif$

$body$

\end{document}
